title: How to Boost Profits and Minimize Risks when Trading Stocks
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
Invest in the stock market, leave your money there for a few years, and you’ll likely enjoy a ten percent return. Traders don’t get out of bed for that kind of money. The only way to make a real profit is to actively trade and use derivatives to boost profits and minimize risk. Real traders don’t gamble. Using technical analysis, we can generally determine when an asset price will increase or decrease in value. Doing that on a short slope during a day trade is easy. Betting on long-term results is more difficult. That’s why derivative payoffs are higher. 

[https://tickeron.com/blogs/how-to-boost-profits-and-minimize-risks-when-trading-stocks-7256](https://tickeron.com/blogs/how-to-boost-profits-and-minimize-risks-when-trading-stocks-7256)
